title: MikroTik RouterBOARD RB922UAGS-5HPacD, L4
description: The RouterBOARD RB922UAGS-5HPacD is a highly versatile RouterBOARD, ideal for building custom solutions. The integrated WiFi card supports the new 802.11ac standard for high-speed wireless connectivity (up to 866 Mbit with 20/40/80 MHz channels). It comes with a RouterOS Level 4 (AP) license 1x SFP port 1x miniPCI-e slot for 3G / 4G modems or WiFi cards 1x USB port 1x SIM slot for use with a 3G / 4G modem via USB 1x Gigabit LAN 2x MMCX connectors (for the integrated card â 1300 mW, 802.11ac, 2x2 radio)
